title: eremostachys laciniata subsp. tournefortii
intro: Eremostachys laciniata subsp. tournefortii is a plant species commonly known as Tournefort's wormwood, which belongs to the Lamiaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains thujone, a compound with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and aiding in digestion and respiratory issues. In traditional medicine, Eremostachys laciniata subsp. tournefortii is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, although its use should be approached with caution due to the potential toxicity of thujone.
